meaning: Accelerated Business Collection and Delivery (美国邮局采用的)加快收寄投递系统
examples: Any change, even if it doesn't fall into the ABCD categories, could indicate cancer.
The fourth-generation theory divides things into four categories-ABCD-according to their urgency and importance.
Instead of abcd a creative young mind will feed off an inspiring story.
The III Encounter of ABCD Filmmakers will take place in Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso, in February 2013, with the support of the Pan-African Film and Television Festival of Ouagadougou (FESPACO).
